name: Arun Kumar
summary: Versatile software engineer with experience in web development, data analysis, machine learning, mobile apps, and UI design. Built multiple full-stack applications and ML models across domains including NLP, computer vision, and analytics.

projects.name: Image Classification System
projects.description: Trained CNN model to classify plant diseases using TensorFlow and Python.

projects.name: Resume Parser NLP
projects.description: Developed NLP pipeline to extract skills and entities from resumes using Python and NLP.

projects.name: Sales Forecasting
projects.description: Time-series forecasting using ARIMA and regression models with Python and Data Analysis.

projects.name: E-commerce Web Platform
projects.description: Built full-stack MERN e-commerce app with authentication, payments, and admin dashboard.

projects.name: Chat Application
projects.description: Real-time chat app using WebSockets and Firebase backend.

projects.name: Portfolio Website
projects.description: Responsive personal portfolio with animations and dark mode.

experience.description: Built predictive models and performed exploratory data analysis on business datasets using Python and Machine Learning.
Developed REST APIs and frontend dashboards for enterprise clients using MERN stack.
Developed cross-platform mobile apps using Flutter and Firebase.

professional_summary: Highly motivated machine learning engineer with experience in developing and training machine learning models, analyzing large datasets, and building deep learning pipelines. Skilled in Python, TensorFlow, PyTorch, and Deep Learning. Proficient in Data Analysis and Statistics.
